attributes.description: Alerts when `bdb_evicted_objects > 0` on a database. For non-caching workloads, evictions are data loss.
attributes.name: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Database unexpected key evictions

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis Enterprise database unexpected key evictions

### What fired
Peak `bdb_evicted_objects` exceeded 0 during the window.

### Why it matters
Evictions may be expected for caches but not for data stores. In the latter case they mean silent data loss.

### Triage
1. Determine the eviction policy applied.
2. Check memory utilisation trend.

### Remediation
- Raise memory / change policy.

### Tuning
- Disable this rule for pure caching workloads.
